blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 14 inches of snowfall of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,049 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 24" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.7" of snow, highs of 37°F, gusts to 45 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 34.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
